_meta.description: Curated cross-strait people-flow annotations not derivable from automated scrapers. Mixes PRC-side administrative records (台胞證 issuance, 2020 PRC Census Bulletin No.8) with TW-side Tourism Bureau annual visitor data that pre-dates MAC 7887's 2017-08 archive window. The policy timeline annotates events on both sides. Pair with the live MAC 7887 monthly series (prc_visitors_tw_10k, tw_visitors_prc_10k) — those are the current cadence; the annual series here are the long-history context.
_meta.refresh_cadence: Permit issuance: quarterly when PRC NIA publishes 移民管理工作主要数据新闻发布会 (typically 4 per year — quarterly + half-year + full-year). Census: decennial (next 2030). Policy timeline: ad-hoc when news scrape surfaces a new measure. Tourism Bureau annuals: yearly when 觀光署 publishes the prior-year rollup (usually Q1).
_meta.next_update_target: Watch NIA 2025年 全年移民管理工作 press release (typically Jan-Feb 2026); fill in 2024 full-year and 2025 full-year permit issuance once Taiwan-specific breakdowns appear. NIA's published headline (e.g. '2024年签发港澳台居民来往内地通行证257.8万张') combines HK/Macao/Taiwan — usable for trend but NOT a TW-only figure. Tourism Bureau: pull annual PRC→TW from stat.taiwan.net.tw/inboundSearch to mirror tw_outbound_annual.

cumulative_milestones.note: Cumulative since the permit was first issued 1992-05-01. ~half of Taiwan's adult population has held one at some point.
cumulative_milestones.source_label: Multiple Xinhua/中新社 reports citing PRC公安部 figures, summarised on Wikipedia 臺灣居民來往大陸通行證

annual_permits_issued.note: Q1-Q3 2024. PRC NIA 三季度新闻发布会 figure. Annual projection ~1.32M. Full-year breakdown by HK/Macao/Taiwan was not published in the year-end press release (only the combined 港澳台 figure of 257.8萬 was given).
annual_permits_issued.source_label: PRC NIA 2024年三季度移民管理工作主要数据新闻发布会

settler_floor.definition: Taiwanese persons enumerated as residents (常住人口) of mainland PRC in the 2020 national population census. Excludes short-term visitors; counts only those with mainland habitual residence.
settler_floor.source_label: 国务院第七次全国人口普查领导小组办公室 第八号公报 (2021-05-11)

policy_timeline.blurb: Initial 91-version booklet format. Cross-strait travel becomes administratively possible for ordinary TW residents.
Per-trip visa endorsement abolished; holders can enter mainland directly using the permit. Major liberalisation.

policy_timeline.event_zh: 電子卡式台胞證全面換發
policy_timeline.blurb: Booklet replaced by chip card. Eight-digit number, machine-readable at border.
Optional secondary ID for TW residents living in PRC long-term (work, study, life). Grants access to social services parallel to PRC residents.
TW visits to PRC drop ~95% YoY. Direct flights and three-mini-links largely suspended. Border restrictions persist through late 2022.
Group tours from TW to PRC permitted; three-mini-links resume. Permit demand rebuilds.
Beijing, Shanghai + 18 other cities pilot online permit renewal for 16+ hukou holders. Reduces friction for long-term TW residents.
PRC waives first-issuance certificate fee through end-2027. Targets TW residents who have never held a permit (estimated 12M+ adults given the 11.6M cumulative figure).
Expanded from limited pilot to all 100 ports of entry. TW residents arriving without a valid permit can get a single-use one at the border.

tw_outbound_annual.source_label: 交通部觀光署 國民出國目的地統計
tw_outbound_annual.note: Annual TW residents departing to mainland China (中國大陸 destination). Authoritative pre-2024; the MAC 7887 monthly tw_visitors_prc_10k series is preferred for 2024-onward cadence — annual rollups of those months should reconcile with these figures (verified: 2023 here = 1,761,134 vs MAC's 112年 = 176.1萬).
